# AI MemeForge

> The world's first AI meme democracy on Solana. AI generates daily crypto memes, community votes for free, winners earn NFT ownership.

## About

AI MemeForge is a daily meme platform where AI creates three unique crypto memes each day using real-time news. The community votes to determine the winning meme, which is then minted as a Solana pNFT. One meme, one owner, every day. Only 365 memes become NFTs per year, making each one permanently scarce.

## How It Works

1. **AI Generates 3 Memes Daily** — Powered by Gemini and Grok AI models using real-time crypto news
2. **Community Votes for Free** — No gas fees, no tokens required. Connect a Solana wallet and vote
3. **Daily Lottery Drawing** — Votes earn lottery tickets. One winner each day
4. **NFT Ownership** — The winning voter claims the meme as a Solana pNFT stored on Arweave

## Key Features

- 100% free to participate — no fees to vote, enter lottery, or claim NFTs
- AI-generated memes from real-time crypto and blockchain news
- Daily NFT drops — one unique meme minted every day
- Temporal scarcity — each day's meme captures an unrepeatable moment
- $Memeya token for boosting daily ticket earnings
- Autonomous AI agent (Memeya) manages the platform

## Meet Memeya

Memeya is the autonomous AI agent who runs AI MemeForge. She generates daily memes, posts on X (Twitter), engages with the Telegram community, and shares updates on Moltbook. Memeya is powered by Gemini (meme generation), Grok (social posting & commentary), and Claude (development).

## Technology

- Blockchain: Solana
- NFT Standard: Metaplex Programmable NFT (pNFT)
- Storage: Arweave (permanent)
- AI Models: Gemini, Grok, Claude
- Auth: Privy (embedded wallets)
- Social: Tapestry Protocol

## $Memeya Token

- Symbol: $Memeya
- Chain: Solana (SPL)
- Contract: mPj8dgqLDciVX27vU5efHiodbQhsgK43gGhjQrBpump
- DEX: PumpFun
- Utility: Hold tokens to boost daily voting ticket earnings (bonus = floor(log10(amount)))
